title: The Crew Reaches Robin
description: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
scene: Across pages 1, 7, 8, 9, this part follows Rob Lucci, Nico Robin, Blueno, Nami, Chopper. The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.

dialogue.speaker: Blueno
dialogue.text: Shut up!!! Last time I looked...

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: No way....!! this can't be happening....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: ... yet, he lost to that brat!!?

summary: The crew and allies converge around the Tower of Justice while Robin’s rescue becomes a declaration against the World Government.
